title: Empty generate for loop fails to compile with -O0
body:
Thanks for taking the time to report this.

Can you attach an example that shows the issue?
```systemverilog
// empty_gen_for.sv
module empty_gen_for;
  for (genvar k = 0; k < 1; k++) begin : gen_empty 
    // empty
  end
endmodule
```

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?
```
verilator -O0 --cc --binary empty_gen_for.sv
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

`Verilator 5.036 2025-04-27 rev v5.036`

I also tried with `master`: `Verilator 5.039 devel rev v5.038-1-g8ba7cec15`

What OS and distribution are you using?

Arch Linux rolling

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?

I can try to debug this if I find some time.
